css: .hero-image-container { width: 100%; max-width: 900px; margin-bottom: 40px; border-radius: 30px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 30px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); border: 2px solid rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.3); transition: 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .hero-image-container:hover { transform: scale(1.02); border-color: #00f2fe; } .hero-main-img { width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; object-fit: cover; } .adv-3d-hero { min-height: 80vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; text-align: center; perspective: 1000px; padding: 40px; } .glitch-title { font-size: 5rem; font-weight: 900; color: #fff; position: relative; letter-spacing: 5px; text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.5); margin-bottom: 10px; } .adv-subtitle { color: #4facfe; font-size: 1.2rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 4px; margin-bottom: 60px; font-weight: 700; } .floating-cube-controls { display: flex; gap: 30px; align-items: center; } .cube-card { width: 280px; padding: 40px 20px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 20px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: all 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); } .cube-card:hover { transform: translateY(-15px) rotateX(10deg); border-color: #00f2fe; box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0, 242, 254, 0.2); } .main-focus { transform: scale(1.1); border-color: #4facfe; background: rgba(79, 172, 254, 0.05); } .inner-glow { position: absolute; top: -50%; left: -50%; width: 200%; height: 200%; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0, 242, 254, 0.1) 0%, transparent 70%); transition: 0.5s; } .cube-card:hover .inner-glow { transform: translate(10%, 10%); } .contact-strip { margin-top: 80px; padding: 20px 40px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); border-radius: 50px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); } .neon-contact { color: #fff; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.9rem; letter-spacing: 2px; } .neon-contact-divider { color: #4facfe; margin: 0 20px; font-weight: 900; }
